response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and post-performance talk perfectly matched the reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was fully utilized for the song 'Mugen'. The intro and outro talk sections were transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue transitions and song segments to match the vocal cues, with silent periods excluded as instructed.

subtitles.original: 目をバチ開いて踊るワン・ツー・スリー
subtitles.english: Open your eyes wide and dance, one, two, three...

subtitles.original: 今この世で君だけ大正解
subtitles.english: Right now in this world, only you are the absolute answer!

subtitles.original: ダーリン ダーリン ダーリン ダーリン...
subtitles.english: Darling, Darling, Darling, Darling...

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に
subtitles.english: To you who knows not the meaning of eternity,

subtitles.original: 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: it is time to show you the answer.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先へ
subtitles.english: To the end of the spiral leading to the illusion...

subtitles.original: 言い訳に聞こえた理由は
subtitles.english: The reason it sounded like an excuse

subtitles.original: 儚い未来 手繰った弱さ
subtitles.english: is the weakness that reeled in a fleeting future.

subtitles.original: それを強さとはき違えている
subtitles.english: You are mistaking that for strength.

subtitles.original: 憎い、憎い 醜い、醜い
subtitles.english: Hateful, hateful, ugly, ugly,

subtitles.original: 月を隠すほどの
subtitles.english: enough to hide the moon.

subtitles.original: 黒く、黒く 淀む、心
subtitles.english: Black, black, a murky heart...

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: If only you weren't here!

subtitles.original: ゆらいでいる ゆらいでる 花のように意思を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: To you who knows not the meaning of eternity, it is time to show you the answer.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先に
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral leading to the illusion,

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: who is waiting?

subtitles.original: 生まれ落ちた運命を飲んだ
subtitles.english: I swallowed the fate I was born into,

subtitles.original: 背負った数の名前を覚えた
subtitles.english: and remembered the names of all the burdens I carry.

subtitles.original: 爛れるほど 心燃やす感情
subtitles.english: An emotion that burns my heart to a crisp.

subtitles.original: 憎い、憎い 醜い、醜い
subtitles.english: Hateful, hateful, ugly, ugly,

subtitles.original: 世界を分かつほどの
subtitles.english: enough to divide the world.

subtitles.original: 怒り、怒り 燃やす、心
subtitles.english: Anger, anger, this burning heart...

subtitles.original: 君さえ居なければ
subtitles.english: If only you weren't here!

subtitles.original: ゆらいでいる ゆらいでる 花のように意思を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: To you who knows not the meaning of eternity, it is time to show you the answer.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先で
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral leading to the illusion...

subtitles.original: 鬼哭に耳を傾けた仕舞よ
subtitles.english: Listen to the demon's cry, for it is the end.

subtitles.original: この身に宿る万物で終いよ
subtitles.english: Ending with everything that dwells in this body.

subtitles.original: 夢幻を他者に託した弱き人
subtitles.english: A weak person who entrusted the illusion to others.

subtitles.original: 命の輝きは幾星霜に
subtitles.english: The radiance of life over countless years...

subtitles.original: 祈りの瞬きが照らす斜陽に
subtitles.english: In the twilight illuminated by the flicker of prayers...

subtitles.original: 千夜を身に宿し
subtitles.english: Carrying thousands of nights within...

subtitles.original: 解を押し付ける
subtitles.english: Forcing an answer upon you.

subtitles.original: 枯らしていく 枯らしていく 夢幻の夜に花を咲く
subtitles.english: Withering, withering, blooming flowers in the illusionary night.

subtitles.original: 繋いでいく 繋いでいく
subtitles.english: Connecting, connecting...

subtitles.original: 嵐に種を撒いていく
subtitles.english: Scattering seeds in the storm.

subtitles.original: ゆらいでいる ゆらいでる 花のように意思を繋ぐ
subtitles.english: Swaying, swaying, connecting our wills like a flower.

subtitles.original: 奪っていく 奪っていく 嵐のように心を裂く
subtitles.english: Taking away, taking away, tearing the heart like a storm.

subtitles.original: 永遠の意味 知らぬ君に 答えを示す時だ
subtitles.english: To you who knows not the meaning of eternity, it is time to show you the answer.

subtitles.original: 夢幻に続く螺旋の先で
subtitles.english: At the end of the spiral leading to the illusion...

subtitles.original: 待つのは誰
subtitles.english: who is waiting?

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ はーい！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Hi!

subtitles.original: ということでニコに来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: And so, we have Nico here with us today!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうございます！ニコたんです！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday! It's Nico-tan!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: よくお歌い... 歌い切れたな！
subtitles.english: We really managed to... sing it all the way through!

subtitles.original: なんかもうね、顔、顔はもう、涙...
subtitles.english: Seriously, my face... I'm already in tears...
